message:
fix(remote): replace detached Phase-0 no-runtime stub with explicit fail-closed fallback policy

Previously, spawn_remote with no attached runtime silently dropped the
result sender, causing the caller to see a generic Closed error with no
diagnostic information. Now it sends the configured fallback error
immediately and derives the initial RemoteTaskState from the result.

New types:
- Phase0RemoteFailure: enum of NodeDown, RuntimeNotAttached,
  SimulationTimeout, Custom for modelling the no-runtime contract
- Phase0RetryPolicy: None, FixedDelay, ExponentialBackoff
- Phase0SimulationConfig: bundles failure mode, retry, and timeout

RemoteCap gains builder methods (with_phase0_simulation,
with_phase0_failure, with_phase0_retry, with_phase0_timeout) and
a phase0_simulation field.

RemoteError gains a NodeDown variant for explicit unreachable-node
signalling from DistributedHarness.

lib.rs: adds extern crate self as asupersync for in-tree test paths
and re-exports the three Phase0 types from the remote module.

Tests: remote_runtime_e2e adds spawn_to_unknown_node_returns_unreachable;
distributed_trace_remote_invariants adds NodeDown to display coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1052,6 +1052,7 @@ fn remote_error_display_variants() {
     let errors: Vec<RemoteError> = vec![
         RemoteError::NoCapability,
         RemoteError::NodeUnreachable("node-x".into()),
+        RemoteError::NodeDown("node-x".into()),
         RemoteError::UnknownComputation("foo".into()),
         RemoteError::LeaseExpired,
         RemoteError::Cancelled(CancelReason::user("test")),
